text:
When is this port going to be submitted?

The download problem was my firewall.

I have no problem moving it to benchmarks. 

Please advise.

Thanks,
Paul.

Paul Root wrote:
> 
> The download works. There's a problem with my Firewall. Joy.
> 
> I've updated my port, fixing the issues that have been pointed
> out. I made a web page for it: http://horton.iaces.com/nettest.
> 
> Thanks,
> Paul.
